evidence_quotes.quote: In all platforms, all smart functionalities and other privacy-intrusive or digital profiling settings shall be defaulted off and shall be switched on by the user only after informed consent. (opt-in system);
The sound is stored when your device recognises activation, for example by Ok, Google or continuous conversations.

paragraphs.text: The citizens’ association Elektrosmog and Health welcomes this initiative, as we also promise in our preamble to defend health and safety against the pitfalls of corporate lobbying, cyber-crime and shirtting data. We will point out one example. The Google account settings in the Data and Privacy section -> Active online and apps -> Include voice and audio activity, write: The sound is stored when your device recognises activation, for example by Ok, Google or continuous conversations. Some devices also include a few seconds before activation to capture the entire request. The sound can sometimes be stored even if your device misrecognises the activation, for example a sound resembling Ok, Google. If you use your device without an internet connection, the sound can be stored in your Google account after reconnecting. Our requirements are: — In all platforms, all smart functionalities and other privacy-intrusive or digital profiling settings shall be defaulted off and shall be switched on by the user only after informed consent. (opt-in system); — Devices and applications shall not bypass the settings of the network. For example, if a Wi-Fi user is switched off, the apps do not have a Wi-Fi search. This concerns Google’s location service and other apps. Users and especially children are not aware that this can be switched off in advanced Wi-Fi settings; Children should not be exposed to mobile radiation without being aware of it and should be informed whenever the mobile emits radiation; We require clear communication that mobile devices are not totally inactive even in sleep mode as long as mobile data or location services are enabled. In this state, the phone continues to send and receive signals because it provides synchronisation of applications, keeps the connection to the network and regularly sends its location for the functions of Find My. Users shall be informed of these processes in a transparent manner. Greeting Petra Bert Polovková for the citizens’ association Elektrosmog and Health This feedback was sent via a cable connection without harmful radiation with less electricity consumption with higher data security
